CREATE TABLE rdf_data (s IRI, p IRI, o IRI);
INSERT INTO rdf_data (s, p, o) VALUES (IRI('<http://example.org/subject1>'), IRI('<http://example.org/predicate1>'), IRI('<http://example.org/object1>'));
INSERT INTO rdf_data (s, p, o) VALUES (IRI('<http://example.org/subject2>'), IRI('<http://example.org/predicate2>'), IRI(''));
INSERT INTO rdf_data (s, p, o) VALUES (IRI('<http://example.org/subject3>'), IRI('<http://example.org/predicate3>'), IRI('<http://example.org/object3>'));
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT (?o)) FROM rdf_data WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER (IsRef(?o)) };
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT (?o)) FROM rdf_data WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER (IsRef(?o)) } LIMIT 10;
SELECT ?s, COUNT(?o) AS count_o FROM rdf_data WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER (IsRef(?o)) } GROUP BY ?s;
SELECT ?o WHERE { SELECT ?o FROM rdf_data WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER (IsRef(?o)) } LIMIT 5 } AS subquery;
SELECT ?s FROM rdf_data AS r1 JOIN rdf_data AS r2 ON r1.p = r2.p WHERE FILTER (IsRef(r1.o) AND IsRef(r2.o));
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT (?o)) FROM rdf_data WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER (IsRef(?o) OR IsRef(?o)) } LIMIT 10;
